facts.claim: We’re so excited about Carnival Radiance bringing all this fun together… emphasis on the “together." (And the fun!) So come join us!
Just like a delicious cake, your ship is made of layers. Find out which fun ingredients — staterooms, dining, activities — go into each deck.
Carnival Radiance is a Destiny-class cruise ship operated by Carnival Cruise Line.
Ordered by Carnival in 1997, the 101,509 GT vessel was the third Destiny-class cruise ship to join the fleet after her debut in 2000 and became one of the largest cruise ships of her era.
In 2021, she was renamed Carnival Radiance after a US$200 million refit was completed in October and she commenced service under her new name in December.
